name: license-server
description: Central license server for MiniMarket POS clients

scripts.prebuild:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('src/index.ts')){console.error('
BUILD FAILED: src/ folder missing on server.
Push the full project with Git (run push-to-github.ps1), not the GitHub website file picker.
');process.exit(1)}"
